north_star_principles: One exact-version Run Authority reducer decides which attempts and claims are accepted.
TransitionWriter and fenced repair custody serialize lifecycle mutation and recovery.
All plan, chain, cloud, repair, resident, and operator views are rebuildable projections.
No legacy authority bypass survives completion.

explicit_ownership_matrix.owns: capability/dispatch grants; coordinator and subject attempts; accepted/rejected/quarantined/superseded decisions; fences; dependency acceptance; the pure authoritative reducer and authority-increasing views
explicit_ownership_matrix.must_not_own: lifecycle writes, repair queue policy, WBC event storage, DAG design, model routing, executor budgets, status rendering, auditing

explicit_ownership_matrix.owns: plan/chain lifecycle CAS; occurrence request/claim/lease/fence; repair dispatch; terminalization; recurrence/reopen; independent verification scheduling
explicit_ownership_matrix.must_not_own: accepting task claims, inventing attempt identity, self-verifying, direct sidecar authority, analytics policy

explicit_ownership_matrix.owns: exact-version boundary contracts; transactional immutable execution-attempt and external-effect store/API; receipts/evidence and payload/reference governance; semantic findings; supported-runtime conformance
explicit_ownership_matrix.must_not_own: grants/acceptance, lifecycle mutation, repair custody, aggregate status, planner/executor policy

explicit_ownership_matrix.owns: coherent observation envelopes; incident/maintenance analytical events; six-hour reconciliation/backstop; daily read-only efficiency analysis; deterministic findings and ticket proposals
explicit_ownership_matrix.must_not_own: a second authority ledger, direct run mutation, active-chain redesign, model/budget changes, self-verified repair

explicit_ownership_matrix.owns: semantic dependency reasons; routing groups; critical-path/parallelism and turn-budget feasibility; complexity splitting; validation-job compilation; task/rework ceilings in the finalized contract
explicit_ownership_matrix.must_not_own: authority acceptance, repair custody, provider effects, projection truth

explicit_ownership_matrix.owns: bounded invalid-ref/startup validation; worker/import/model isolation; timeout/failover/compaction/rework circuits; deterministic harness jobs; verify-only repair-receipt adoption
explicit_ownership_matrix.must_not_own: silently widening scope/budget, rewriting attempts, blind retry, accepting stale repair work

explicit_ownership_matrix.owns: append-efficient projection builders; latency/work ledger; pure status/introspection; exact-evidence deterministic reasons; SLO and drift reporting
explicit_ownership_matrix.must_not_own: refreshing liveness on read, resolving authority independently, performing repair, combining productive and replayed work

global_blockers.description: Run Authority M1-M3 completion receipts: all three have `accepted: false`. Stale/missing phase evidence, diff mismatches, and structural failures prevent acceptance. M5 owns reconciliation and canonical retirement proof before adoption proceeds. Until accepted, Run Authority ownership decisions remain provisional.
source_evidence: migration matrix row 0 (Run Authority M1-M3 completion receipts)
global_blockers.required_resolution: Three content-addressed accepted receipts with canonical divergence count 0

global_blockers.description: Portfolio gate approval required for PC scope decision. Migration matrix row 91 (PC adjacent work) has owner 'Portfolio gate' (human portfolio gate) with proof requirement `PC_SCOPE_DECISION`. Until human approval is recorded, PC defaults to program counter and M7 is blocked on material overlap.
global_blockers.required_resolution: Human portfolio gate approval record for PC scope decision

global_blockers.description: M5 bound-head (8bb779d) does not match current HEAD. Prerequisite verification reports INCOHERENT for m5_bound_head_vs_current_head. Downstream M6 handoff artifacts are not marked complete until this is resolved.
global_blockers.required_resolution: Either rebase to M5 bound head or produce successor attestation

global_blockers.description: WBC file hash check reports INCOHERENT: one source file mismatch between current working tree and the WBC integration commit (24afce00). This must be resolved before WBC ownership evidence is fully coherent.
global_blockers.required_resolution: Reconcile diverged WBC file or accept as documented drift
